summary: Critical: workflow references missing fixture files (fixtures/build-*.{xml,json}); actions/checkout@v4 not pinned to SHA. Script uses grep for JSON/XML (non-POSIX -oP) vs jq/xmllint—fragile. find_flaky_tests() unimplemented. aggregate_test_results ~55-80 has identical XML/JSON branches. Workflow fails at fixture-validation job. Fixtures not provided = incomplete deliverable.
